title: THSTI – Research Officer, Project Manager and More – 6 Posts

basic_details.job_title: THSTI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Officer, Project Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI) Recruitment 2026 for 6 posts of Project Positions. Candidates with M.Sc, M.Pharm, MPH, Ph.D Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 01-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through THSTI official website thsti.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Life Sciences/Pharmacy/Public Health, PhD (desirable), Clinical trial monitoring experience, GCP certification, Finance & Accounts experience

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the THSTI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
